message:
feat(ext4): add case-insensitive directory lookup and relax incompat flags

Add Unicode case-folding support for ext4 directory lookups, enabling
filesystems with the CASEFOLD feature flag to be read correctly.

- Add lookup_in_dir_block_casefold() for case-insensitive directory
  entry matching with UTF-8 case-folding and ASCII fallback
- Add casefold_name() helper applying Unicode case transformation
- Relax REJECTED_V1 incompat flags: drop CASEFOLD and INLINE_DATA
  from rejection list (now only rejecting COMPRESSION, JOURNAL_DEV,
  ENCRYPT)
- Fix test fixture: add missing s_desc_size and group descriptor
  fields (free_blocks_count, free_inodes_count) for complete ext4
  superblock metadata
- Update beads issue tracking with progress on fast-commit and
  tree-log implementation tasks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
